backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of Google Maps iframe from the contact section in App.tsx while preserving the text address display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the main App component, global styles with medical color system, and Tailwind configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using a neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Ghuge Medicals website that loads the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component displaying Ghuge Medicals website with header, business hours, contact information, services, about section, and footer with medical-themed styling (Google Maps iframe removed).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with OKLCH color variables defining a medical-themed green and blue color system for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with medical-themed OKLCH color tokens, custom container settings, system font stack, and extended design tokens including animations and shadows.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for Ghuge Medicals website, documenting 11 features including business info display, contact details, location (text-only, map removed), and medical-themed design. Contains architectural notes indicating new business information section to be added and map coordinates updates from Google Maps link.
